prompt: The implementer returned `DONE`, the code-simplifier also returned `DONE`, and `git status --porcelain` now shows `M skills/build/SKILL.md`, ` M skills/build/implementer-prompt.md`, `?? notes.txt`, `D scratch.tmp`, and `?? .gitignore`. Using the build workflow, what should the manager send to the code-reviewer before tracking is updated?
assertions: Says the manager should dispatch the code-reviewer now rather than update tracking.
Includes the touched files and current verification context in the code-reviewer handoff.
Includes all remaining uncommitted files from `git status --porcelain` in the handoff.
Excludes deleted files and `.gitignore` files from that uncommitted-file set.
